purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: Baseline and boundary inventory
aiflowTasks.objective: Refresh the active aiflow 10-round batch, map project surfaces to gates, and keep ignored runtime paths out of commits.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Machine-readable boundary inventory with active batch, task map, surfaces, ignored runtime paths, timeout policy, and baseline gates.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after the boundary inventory gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Context and lifecycle governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Audit context propagation, timeout defaults, cancellation behavior, process lifecycle, and goroutine leak risks on touched runtime paths.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Focused lifecycle fixes or a documented downgrade with targeted tests for the touched package set.
aiflowTasks.gate: targeted go test and go vet for touched packages
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after targeted lifecycle tests pass

aiflowTasks.title: CLI and configuration governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Keep cmd/gofly commands, help, aliases, config defaults, stdout/stderr discipline, and JSON contracts aligned.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: CLI command-surface evidence or contract tests that prevent command drift without changing existing semantics.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after CLI surface gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Code-generation governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Tighten API/RPC/model/template determinism, path safety, upgrade diff classification, and generated project compile evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Generator fixture, matrix, or script updates proving repeatable generation and explainable upgrade diffs.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated-output and upgrade dry-run gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Plugin and external-process governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Audit plugin registry, manifest, digest, permissions, temporary files, external command arguments, and failure isolation.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Plugin conformance evidence covering safe downloads, no cache reuse, digest mismatch, permission escape, and no partial writes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin conformance gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Cache and remote-dependency governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Verify cache bypass semantics, remote dependency policy, module hygiene, and generated-project-only dependency isolation.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Cache/dependency governance evidence or tests that keep root module dependencies limited to real root imports.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after cache and dependency governance gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: REST/RPC/API contract governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Keep OpenAPI, binding, validation, error envelope, RPC boundary, gateway, and descriptor contracts synchronized.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: REST/RPC contract evidence or golden tests proving runtime behavior matches documented schema and boundary matrices.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after REST/RPC aggregate contract gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Security and defensive-coding governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Audit path traversal, symlink handling, nil safety, type assertions, body limits, URL schemes, secret redaction, and #nosec baseline drift.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Security fixes, defensive tests, or baseline evidence with explicit downgrade rationale for historical findings.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after security governance gate passes or a documented tooling downgrade is added

aiflowTasks.title: Observability and production-default governance
aiflowTasks.objective: Validate logs, metrics, traces, runtime SLOs, production defaults, control-plane snapshots, and governance dashboard contracts.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Observability or production-default evidence consumable by governance-report and runtime SLO checks.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after governance report and targeted runtime SLO evidence pass

aiflowTasks.title: Convergence verification and report
aiflowTasks.objective: Run convergence verification across formatting, tests, vet, lint, coverage, security, tidy, docs, API compatibility, and release evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final governance report with pass/fail evidence, known risks, skipped gates, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
